working_on.task: Refactored social comments to generate dynamic timestamps and random display orders, linked Zalo input
working_on.notes: Code is successfully pushed to GitHub

pending_tasks.notes: Verify the dynamic dates and Zalo linking on actual mobile devices

recent_changes.description: Generated high-quality images for routes and pricing cars
Fixed text wrapping issues across multiple components using CSS clamp() and whitespace-nowrap
Moved comments to client component to support random shuffling and exact date rendering (e.g. '12 tháng 6, 2026') for older comments.
Linked Zalo to the comment fake input box to trigger chat.

errors_encountered.error: AI image background not pure white
Hero title wrapping on iPhone SE

errors_encountered.solution: Used useEffect to set random comments only on client mount, rendering a skeleton initially.

decisions_made.decision: Use CSS scale and contrast instead of manual image editing
Add whitespace-nowrap to badges and titles
decisions_made.reason: Ensures clean single-line UI on narrow screens

decisions_made.decision: Extract comments into a Client Component
decisions_made.reason: Avoids making the entire page.tsx a client component just for dynamic comments
